pre_end_cards.descHtml: Architect HIPAA-aware RAG, multi-modal LLM fusion, and fine-tuned clinical documentation pipelines with guardrails for regulated healthcare environments.
Build ingestion, embedding, evaluation, and monitoring pipelines with Airflow, FastAPI, and cloud-native MLOps for versioned model deployment.
Deploy containerized inference on EKS with zero-trust networking, federated learning, and observability for LLM latency, retrieval quality, and drift.

story-gamification-hero.descHtml:
Engineering leader with 15+ years in data-intensive software, intelligent applications, search, analytics, and enterprise AI across healthcare, financial services, forestry, and regulated environments.
Hands-on across predictive modeling, NLP, RAG, vector search, LLM evaluation, agentic workflows, and secure production integration — reducing manual work up to 70%.

story-gamification-battle-pass.descHtml: Built healthcare clinical intelligence on fine-tuned LLMs and Qdrant RAG, forestry operations platforms with LangChain retrieval, and Google-scale semantic search with BERT-based ranking.

story-gamification-ranks.descHtml: PyTorch, computer vision, graph neural networks, XGBoost, LightGBM, and multi-modal fusion for clinical imaging, wound segmentation, forecasting, and search relevance.

story-gamification-chests.descHtml:
Google & industry credentials supporting AI, analytics, and digital marketing leadership.

Google Ads Search Certification (2026–2027)
Google Analytics Certification (2026–2027)
Indeed Certified Partner (2019–Present)
Google Certified Google Ads Partner (2013)

story-gamification-leaderboard.descHtml: Python, RAG/LLM engineering, PyTorch, GCP & AWS MLOps, vector search, and production GenAI — 15+ years across healthcare, search, forestry, and enterprise platforms.

story-rewards-hero.descHtml: Principal AI/ML & Generative AI Solutions Engineer leading CHIP — a secure clinical healthcare intelligence platform for automated wound care workflows.
bullets: Architected CHIP, a cloud-native medical analytics platform for automated biological wound care and ActiGraft product suites
Engineered fine-tuned Llama-3-8B / BioGPT pipelines with Pydantic schema enforcement — cutting nurse charting overhead 70%
Designed RAG with Qdrant and bge-reranker-large with metadata tenant isolation for FDA guideline retrieval
Built multi-modal LLM + CLIP ViT-L/14 fusion for bedside wound imagery and unstructured lab biomarker analysis
Developed PyTorch U-Net + ResNet-50 segmentation achieving 0.93 Dice on ulcer tissue matrices
Deployed federated learning with Flower/NVIDIA FLARE and zero-trust AWS EKS architecture with HL7/FHIR exchange

story-rewards-referral.descHtml: Clinical Healthcare Intelligence Platform — multi-modal GenAI backend for regulated medical workflows.
metaChips: RAG · CV · Graph ML · Federated Learning
bullets: Knowledge graph via Neo4j + GCN in PyTorch Geometric mapping patient co-morbidities for wound-healing timeline prediction
LightGBM models paired with graph features for clinical decision support across hospital networks
Istio service mesh (mTLS) and containerized microservices on Amazon EKS for secure medical data exchange
Production guardrails: schema enforcement, tenant isolation, and HIPAA/GDPR-compliant decentralized model updates

story-rewards-cashback.descHtml: Senior AI/ML & Data Solutions Engineer — Forest Operations Intelligence Platform for geospatial analytics and field operations.
bullets: Built Python, SQL, Airflow, PostgreSQL, and PostGIS pipelines for field reports, milestones, weather, and spatial records
Trained Scikit-learn, XGBoost, and LightGBM models for delay risk and workload forecasting — improving planning 18–22%
Developed LangChain RAG for historical report retrieval, issue extraction, and natural-language search with human review
Shipped FastAPI services and React/Next.js dashboards — reducing recurring reporting effort ~30%

story-rewards-staking.descHtml: LLM evaluation, Gemini tooling, and BERT-based search ranking — semantic query understanding at Google scale.
bullets: Contributed to semantic query understanding for ambiguous, long-tail, and conversational searches using BERT-based approaches
Combined dense retrieval with BM25 and FAISS/ScanN-style vector search; improved serving via distillation and quantization
Built Python utilities for prompt regression, grounding checks, and automated evaluation across diverse Gemini-style examples
Defined evaluation criteria for accuracy, grounding, format compliance, and unsafe responses before broader rollout

story-rewards-community.descHtml: Founder and engineering lead delivering data-driven products — from early search optimization to predictive ML platforms.
bullets: Founded Design Right 4 U — web platforms, analytics, search optimization, marketing automation, and customer-acquisition systems
Pioneered ML transition (2016–2018): predictive pipelines with Scikit-learn for lead scoring, churn, and campaign forecasting
Directed WaMu enterprise programs (>$2M) improving on-time delivery ~20% and reducing post-release defects 15–25%
Texas Tech B.S. in Computer/Information Technology Administration and Management

story-airdrops-post-hero.descHtml:
Python, LangChain, PyTorch, Gemini, Vertex AI, FastAPI, Airflow,
GCP, AWS, Qdrant, FAISS, Docker, Kubernetes, and full-stack ML platform delivery.

story-airdrops-post-seasons.descHtml: 70% less nurse charting · 0.93 Dice wound segmentation · 18–22% better planning accuracy · 30% less reporting effort · 20% faster enterprise delivery.

story-airdrops-pre-hero.descHtml: Texas Tech University — computer and information technology administration and management.

education.degree: B.S. Computer/Information Technology Administration and Management

story-airdrops-pre-engagement.descHtml: Continuously exploring new AI, LLM, and cloud technologies — from Gemini evaluation and agentic workflows to production MLOps — to deliver greater impact as a hands-on technical leader.
